title: .NET API Architecture — NXGN Actions
purpose: **AI Summary**: The .NET backend follows vertical slice architecture with FastEndpoints. Features are organized under `Features/` as self-contained slices with per-endpoint folders (Save/, Get/, Delete/) and a `Shared/` folder for queries, commands, and DI-registered mapper classes. All DTOs, requests, and responses live in `Nxgn.Actions.Contracts/` — never in the API project. Management endpoints extend `TenantEndpoint` base classes that extract tenant and actor from JWT claims. All commands...

examples.name: Project Structure Example 1
examples.code:
Nxgn.Actions/
│
├── Nxgn.Actions.Api/                    # The API server
│   ├── Features/                        # Vertical slices (see below)
│   ├── Data/                            # DbContext, entities, EF configurations, migrations
│   ├── Bootstrap/                       # App startup, service registration
│   └── Infrastructure/                  # Cross-cutting (caching, middleware, interceptors)
│
├── Nxgn.Actions.Contracts/              # DTOs, requests, responses (shared boundary)
│   ├── Actions/                         #   ActionDTO, SaveActionRequest, etc.
│   ├── Workflows/                       #   WorkflowDefinitionDTO, SaveWorkflowRequest, etc.
│   ├── ComplianceProfiles/              #   ComplianceProfileDTO, etc.
│   ├── EscalationRules/                 #   EscalationRuleDTO, etc.
│   ├── Languages/                       #   LanguageDTO, etc.
│   └── Shared/                          #   GridListResponse<T>, PagedRequest, EnumDTO, NamedDTO
│
├── Nxgn.Actions.Tests.Unit/             # Unit tests
├── Nxgn.Actions.Tests.Integration/      # Integration tests
├── Nxgn.Actions.Tests.Architecture/     # Architecture fitness tests
├── Nxgn.Actions.Client/                 # Typed HTTP client for consumer apps
├── Nxgn.Actions.Cli/                    # CLI tool (presentation layer only)
├── Nxgn.Actions.Mcp/                    # MCP server (presentation layer only)
├── Nxgn.Actions.Web.Ui/                 # Angular 21 admin console
├── Nxgn.Actions.Web.Bff/                # Backend-for-frontend (Angular proxy)
├── Nxgn.Actions.AppHost/                # .NET Aspire orchestration
└── Nxgn.Actions.ServiceDefaults/        # Aspire service defaults

examples.name: Feature Organization Example 1
examples.code:
Features/
├── Actions/                         # Action management (aggregate root)
│   ├── Evidence/                    # Sub-feature: evidence attachments
│   ├── Consultations/               # Sub-feature: consultation records
│   └── Deadlines/                   # Sub-feature: deadline tracking
├── Admin/
│   ├── Workflows/                   # Workflow definition management
│   ├── ComplianceProfiles/          # Compliance profile configuration
│   ├── EscalationRules/             # Escalation rule management
│   └── Languages/                   # Language configuration
└── Shared/                          # Cross-feature base classes (TenantEndpoint)

examples.name: Feature Organization Example 2
examples.code:
Features/Admin/Workflows/
├── Save/
│   ├── SaveWorkflowEndpoint.cs            # POST /api/v1/admin/workflows
│   └── SaveWorkflowRequestValidator.cs    # FluentValidation shape checks
├── Get/
│   └── GetWorkflowEndpoint.cs             # GET /api/v1/admin/workflows/{id}
├── GetGridList/
│   └── GetWorkflowGridListEndpoint.cs     # POST /api/v1/admin/workflows/grid-list
├── Delete/
│   └── DeleteWorkflowEndpoint.cs          # POST /api/v1/admin/workflows/delete
├── GetLookupList/                         # (optional)
│   └── GetWorkflowLookupListEndpoint.cs   # GET /api/v1/admin/workflows/lookup
└── Shared/
    ├── Queries/
    │   ├── GetWorkflowQuery.cs             # Single entity with includes
    │   ├── GetWorkflowsQuery.cs            # Paged list
    │   ├── GetWorkflowsCountQuery.cs       # Parallel count for grid
    │   ├── GetWorkflowLookupQuery.cs       # Dropdown data
    │   └── WorkflowQueryParameters.cs      # Fluent filter builder
    ├── Commands/
    │   ├── SaveWorkflowCommand.cs          # Upsert → EntityMapperResult<T>
    │   └── DeleteWorkflowCommand.cs        # Bulk → CommandResult
    └── Mappers/
        ├── WorkflowEntityMapper.cs         # DTO → Entity (DI-registered)
        ├── WorkflowDTOMapper.cs            # Entity → DTO (DI-registered)
        └── WorkflowDTOMapperDataContext.cs  # (if 2+ extra data types)

examples.name: This mirrors the frontend's vertical slice
examples.code:
modules/admin/workflows/
├── workflow.service.ts               ← Endpoint calls
├── workflow.models.ts                ← Contracts/{Entity}/ DTOs
├── workflow-list.component.ts        ← GetGridList
├── workflow-capture.component.ts     ← Get + Save
└── workflow-state-list.component.ts  ← Embedded child list

examples.name: HTTP Request Flow Example 1
examples.code:
HTTP Request
     |
     v
FastEndpoints Framework
  /api/v1/*         -> FastEndpoints management API

  Endpoint (thin orchestrator)
     |
     +-- SaveCommand / DeleteCommand / Query
     |       |
     |       +-- EntityMapper.Map() -> EntityMapperResult<T>
     |       |       (NewItems / UpdatedItems / DeletedItems lists)
     |       +-- Child diffing in command
     |
     +-- DTOMapper.Map() / DTOMapper.MapGridItem() (entity -> DTO)
     |       +-- DTOMapperDataContext (pre-loaded lookup data)
     |       +-- TranslationService (language-aware name/description resolution)
     |
     +-- QueryParameters (fluent filter builder per feature)
     |
     v
  ActionsDbContext (PostgreSQL)
     |
     +-- actions schema (all tables)
     +-- Redis (cache, sessions)

examples.name: CQRS: Light Separation Example 1
examples.code:
QUERIES (Read)                        COMMANDS (Write)
--------------                        ----------------
Get{Entity}Query                      Save{Entity}Command (upsert)
Get{Entity}sQuery (grid)              Delete{Entity}Command (bulk)
Get{Entity}sCountQuery
Get{Entity}LookupQuery

  AsNoTracking                          EntityMapper.Map() -> EntityMapperResult<T>
  QueryParameters filtering             Child diffing in command
  Projections                           TOCTOU try/catch on save
  No side effects                       Post-save best-effort side effects

              Same database: ActionsDbContext

examples.name: Infrastructure Layers Example 1
examples.code:
Data/
├── ActionsDbContext.cs               # Single context, actions schema
├── Entities/                         # Entity base classes, interfaces
│   ├── Entity.cs                     # Guid Id
│   ├── TrackedEntity.cs              # + CreatedDate, CreatedById, UpdatedDate, UpdatedById
│   ├── ITenantEntity.cs              # TenantId (Guid)
│   ├── ITranslatedEntity.cs          # i18n support (translations from day one)
│   ├── ISoftDeletable.cs             # Soft delete support
│   └── IVersioned.cs                 # Optimistic concurrency
├── Configuration/                    # IEntityTypeConfiguration<T> per entity (ADR-0018)
├── Interceptors/                     # TenantInterceptor (RLS session variable)
└── Migrations/                       # EF Core code-first migrations

examples.name: File Placement Decision Tree Example 1
examples.code:
I need to add...
│
├─► An entity class → Data/Entities/{Entity}.cs
│   Inherits TrackedEntity (or Entity for join tables).
│   Implements ITenantEntity if tenant-scoped.
│   Implements ITranslatedEntity<T> if translatable.
│   Implements ISoftDeletable if soft-deletable.
│   Implements IVersioned if optimistic concurrency needed.
│
├─► An EF configuration → Data/Configuration/{Entity}Configuration.cs
│   IEntityTypeConfiguration<T>. Schema "actions". HasConversion<string>() for enums.
│
├─► A DTO, request, or response → Nxgn.Actions.Contracts/{Entity}/
│   NEVER in the API project. Contracts is the shared boundary.
│
├─► An endpoint → Features/{Entity}/{Verb}/
│   Extends TenantEndpoint base. Thin orchestrator — delegates to commands/queries.
│
├─► A validator → Features/{Entity}/{Verb}/ (next to endpoint)
│   FluentValidation. Shape validation only (lengths, formats, ranges).
│
├─► A query → Features/{Entity}/Shared/Queries/
│   AsNoTracking. Returns entity or projection. No side effects.
│
├─► A command → Features/{Entity}/Shared/Commands/
│   Owns business logic, child diffing, side effects.
│
├─► A mapper → Features/{Entity}/Shared/Mappers/
│   DI-registered via AddScoped. EntityMapper or DTOMapper.
│
├─► A cross-feature base class → Features/Shared/
│   TenantEndpoint variants, shared helper types.
│
├─► A migration → Data/Migrations/
│   Generated by EF Core CLI. Never modify by hand.
│
├─► A bootstrap seeder → Bootstrap/
│   Idempotent upsert logic. Runs at startup.
│
└─► Cross-cutting middleware → Infrastructure/
    Caching, rate limiting, interceptors.

rules.rule_text: **All contract types in `Nxgn.Actions.Contracts/`** — DTOs, requests, responses never in the API project
**`DTO` suffix ALL CAPS** — `WorkflowDTO`, not `WorkflowDto`
**Primary constructors** — no `_privateField` naming
**DI-registered mapper classes** — `EntityMapper` and `DTOMapper` via `AddScoped`, not extension methods
**`IDbContextFactory`** — short-lived contexts via factory, not scoped injection
**Enums over string constants** — `HasConversion<string>()` in EF Core ([ADR-0004](../../adr/0004-enum-over-string-constants-for-status-fields.md))
**EnumDTO/NamedDTO for UI binding** — structured types, not bare IDs ([ADR-0005](../../adr/0005-enumdto-nameddto-for-ui-binding.md))
**`actions` schema** — all tables in the `actions` schema
**Explicit `OnDelete()` on all FKs** — no implicit cascades
**Explicit DI registration** — per-feature `Add{Feature}()`, no reflection scanning
**RLS for tenant isolation** — no tenant filtering in application code
**Translations from day one** — use `ITranslatedEntity<T>` for translatable entities
**`TagWith()`** — SQL query identification for debugging
**`AsSplitQuery()`** — when includes would cause cartesian explosion
**`AsNoTracking()`** — on all read-only queries
**`Task.WhenAll()`** — for independent parallel queries (grid data + count)
**Follow completed Actions features as templates** — copy a working feature slice
**Put DTOs in the API project** — everything that crosses HTTP goes in Contracts
**Use MVC controllers** — FastEndpoints exclusively
**Use horizontal layers** — no `Services/`, `Repositories/` folders
**Modify migration files** — generated by EF Core CLI, never hand-edited
**Use `AddSingleton` for feature services** — always `AddScoped`
**Use string constants for classifications** — always enums
**Put business logic in endpoints** — endpoints are thin orchestrators, delegate to commands
**Filter by TenantId in application code** — RLS handles tenant isolation

sections.title: Project Structure
content: │   ├── Data/                            # DbContext, entities, EF configurations, migrations
├── Nxgn.Actions.Client/                 # Typed HTTP client for consumer apps

sections.title: Feature Organization
content: Each feature is a self-contained vertical slice under `Features/`. Per-endpoint folders contain the endpoint and validator. `Shared/` contains the queries, commands, and mapper classes that the endpoints orchestrate.
This mirrors the frontend's vertical slice:

sections.title: HTTP Request Flow
content: All management endpoints (`/api/v1/*`) run with tenant context from the JWT. They use the `TenantEndpoint` base class which extracts `TenantId` and `UserId` from JWT claims.

sections.title: Key Architectural Concepts
content: - **Save (upsert) pattern**: Single `SaveCommand` handles both create and update. `SaveRequest` inherits from the DTO; `Id == Guid.Empty` means create, non-empty means update.
- **EntityMapperResult\<T>**: `EntityMapper.Map()` returns a result with `NewItems`, `UpdatedItems`, and `DeletedItems` lists. The command applies these to the DbContext.
- **DI-registered mapper classes**: `EntityMapper` (DTO → entity) and `DTOMapper` (entity → DTO) are classes registered via `AddScoped`. No extension methods.
- **DTOMapperDataContext**: Pre-loaded lookup data bag passed to `DTOMapper.Map()` for resolving names, enums, and related entities.
- **TenantEndpoint base**: Variants extract `TenantId` and `UserId` from JWT claims. All management endpoints inherit from one of these.
- **Child diffing in command**: Child collection add/update/delete is computed in the SaveCommand, not in the mapper.
- **Contracts as API boundary**: ALL DTOs, requests, and responses live in `Nxgn.Actions.Contracts` — never in the API project. CLI, MCP, and typed clients share these types.

- **Translations from day one**: Entities implement `ITranslatedEntity<T>` for multi-language support. `TranslationService` resolves names based on the request language. EntityMapper accepts `List<DTO>` batches with language parameters.
- **RLS for tenant isolation**: Row-Level Security on `TenantId` at the PostgreSQL level. Application code does not filter by tenant.
- **PagedQueryParameters\<T>**: Base class for query parameters without TenantId (RLS handles filtering). Features extend this with entity-specific filters.

sections.title: CQRS: Light Separation
content: Commands and queries are separate classes but share the same database. No event sourcing, no separate read store.
QueryParameters filtering             Child diffing in command
No side effects                       Post-save best-effort side effects

sections.title: Infrastructure Layers
content: │   ├── ITranslatedEntity.cs          # i18n support (translations from day one)
Cross-cutting middleware: caching, rate limiting, error handling. Services that span multiple features but are not feature logic.

sections.title: Naming Conventions
content: | **Feature folder** | PascalCase, domain noun (plural if collection) | `Workflows/`, `EscalationRules/` |

sections.title: File Placement Decision Tree
content: │   Inherits TrackedEntity (or Entity for join tables).
│   Implements IVersioned if optimistic concurrency needed.
├─► A DTO, request, or response → Nxgn.Actions.Contracts/{Entity}/
│   NEVER in the API project. Contracts is the shared boundary.
│   Extends TenantEndpoint base. Thin orchestrator — delegates to commands/queries.
│   FluentValidation. Shape validation only (lengths, formats, ranges).
│   AsNoTracking. Returns entity or projection. No side effects.
│   Owns business logic, child diffing, side effects.
│   DI-registered via AddScoped. EntityMapper or DTOMapper.
│   Generated by EF Core CLI. Never modify by hand.
│   Idempotent upsert logic. Runs at startup.

sections.title: Approved Deviations from Capstone
content: | **Messaging** | Wolverine + RabbitMQ | None initially — standalone Actions service | Will add messaging when inter-service communication is needed |
| **Database** | 3 DbContexts (Model, Data, Calculation) | 1 ActionsDbContext | Actions is a single bounded context |
| **Tenant column** | `TenantId` | `TenantId` | Same as Capstone (unlike Identity which uses `OrganizationId`) |
| **Endpoint base** | `TenantEndpoint` with DB user lookup | `TenantEndpoint` with JWT-only extraction | Aligns with Capstone naming; JWT claims provide tenant context |
| **DB schema** | Default schema | `actions` schema | Multi-service database with schema isolation |
| **Grid response** | Custom grid response | `GridListResponse<T>` shared contract type | Standardized response shape |
| **Grid route** | GET with query params | POST `/grid-list` | Supports complex filter payloads |
| **Delete route** | Varies | POST `/delete` | Batch delete with request body |
| **Pagination** | Offset/Limit | `PagedRequest` with `Page`/`PageSize` | More natural for frontend pagination controls |
| **Translations** | ITranslatedEntity + TranslationService | ITranslatedEntity + TranslationService | Same as Capstone — supported from day one |
| **Configuration style** | Static extension methods on `ModelBuilder` | `IEntityTypeConfiguration<T>` (ADR-0018) | Per-entity configuration classes, auto-discovered |
| **Delete result** | Various | `CommandResult` | Typed result object with structured error |
| **Factory** | CfFactory for orchestration | No factory — commands are standalone | Simpler architecture without orchestration layer |
| **Context parameter** | `ModelDbContext? modelDb = null` | `ActionsDbContext? db = null` | Same pattern, different context name |
| **Validator base** | `TenantRequestValidator<T>` | `Validator<T>` (FastEndpoints default) | No tenant request base class; tenant context comes from endpoint base |

| **Request base** | `TenantRequest` → `KeyedDTO` → `NamedDTO` → `EntityDTO` → `SaveRequest` | `KeyedDTO` → `NamedDTO` → `SaveRequest` (no `TenantRequest`/`EntityDTO` layers) | Simpler hierarchy; tenant context from TenantEndpoint, not request base |
| **Contracts path** | `Contracts/Features/{Group}/{Entity}/` | `Contracts/{Entity}/` (flat, no Features or Group layer) | Fewer features, flat layout preferred |
| **GridRow DTOMapper** | Separate `{Entity}GridRowDTOMapper` class | Combined `MapGridItem()` method on `{Entity}DTOMapper` | Single mapper class with methods per DTO shape reduces file count |
| **EntityMapper signature** | Single-entity primary | `List<DTO>` batch primary with language params | Batch-first for bulk import; translations from day one |
When using `/scaffold-feature` (from `nxgn.patterns`) against Actions, the skill generates Capstone-profile defaults. Apply these adjustments to the generated code:
| Generated (Capstone default) | Change to (Actions convention) | Files affected |
| Separate `{Entity}GridRowDTOMapper` class | Combine into `{Entity}DTOMapper.MapGridItem()` | Mapper classes, DI registration |
| `UserId` on endpoint base | Verify matches `TenantEndpoint` property name | Endpoint handler methods |

sections.title: Shared Conventions (from Capstone)
content: | **Primary constructors** | All services, endpoints, queries, commands |
| **No `_privateField`** | Use primary constructor parameter names directly |
| **DI-registered mapper classes** | `EntityMapper` (DTO → entity) and `DTOMapper` (entity → DTO) — registered via `AddScoped` |
| **PagedQueryParameters\<T>** | Base class for paged queries — does NOT include TenantId (RLS handles it) |
| **IDbContextFactory** | Short-lived contexts via factory, not scoped injection |
| **AsSplitQuery()** | Prevent cartesian explosion with multiple includes |
| **SaveRequest inherits DTO** | SaveRequest extends the main DTO; `Guid.Empty` Id for create detection |

sections.title: Rules
content: 1. **All contract types in `Nxgn.Actions.Contracts/`** — DTOs, requests, responses never in the API project
4. **DI-registered mapper classes** — `EntityMapper` and `DTOMapper` via `AddScoped`, not extension methods
5. **`IDbContextFactory`** — short-lived contexts via factory, not scoped injection
6. **Enums over string constants** — `HasConversion<string>()` in EF Core ([ADR-0004](../../adr/0004-enum-over-string-constants-for-status-fields.md))
7. **EnumDTO/NamedDTO for UI binding** — structured types, not bare IDs ([ADR-0005](../../adr/0005-enumdto-nameddto-for-ui-binding.md))
8. **`actions` schema** — all tables in the `actions` schema
9. **Explicit `OnDelete()` on all FKs** — no implicit cascades
10. **Explicit DI registration** — per-feature `Add{Feature}()`, no reflection scanning
11. **RLS for tenant isolation** — no tenant filtering in application code
12. **Translations from day one** — use `ITranslatedEntity<T>` for translatable entities
2. **`AsSplitQuery()`** — when includes would cause cartesian explosion
4. **`Task.WhenAll()`** — for independent parallel queries (grid data + count)
5. **Follow completed Actions features as templates** — copy a working feature slice
1. **Put DTOs in the API project** — everything that crosses HTTP goes in Contracts
4. **Modify migration files** — generated by EF Core CLI, never hand-edited
6. **Use string constants for classifications** — always enums
7. **Put business logic in endpoints** — endpoints are thin orchestrators, delegate to commands
8. **Filter by TenantId in application code** — RLS handles tenant isolation
